title: RenderLib 1.8.9 port
description: A port of a mixin mod RenderLib to 1.8.9.
body:
## RenderLib (1.8.9 Port)

This mod is the port to 1.8.9 of the original mod **RenderLib**, which was made by [Meldexun](https://modrinth.com/user/Meldexun).

The original mod is present at: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/renderlib) or [GitHub](https://github.com/Meldexun/RenderLib/)

Disclamer: i have permission from Meldexun for publishing this port. [Proof](https://discord.com/channels/845472175527559218/977865298906587146/1442149531906080932)

Do not report an issue of this mod to Meldexun. Report it at the provided github "Issues" page.

### About RenderLib

**RenderLib** is a client-side only mod that makes necessary changes to entity and tile entity rendering for some of my other mods (Other ports of mods which were also made by Meldexun). This mod on its own does not provide any meaningful improvements regarding performance and you probably only want to install it when using a mod that has this mod as a dependency.

### Requirements

This port already pre-bundles org.spongepowered and its other dependencies (it.unimi.dsi:fastutil:7.1.0).

It requires ConfigurationsBackport v1.1 present here: https://modrinth.com/mod/configurationsbackport

### Required By

My port of Nothirium to 1.8.9: https://github.com/my-life-is-bad/Nothirium-1.8.9-port

My port of EntityCulling to 1.8.9: https://github.com/my-life-is-bad/EntityCulling-1.8.9-port
